name: Pre-Engineered Buildings
description:
A pre-engineered building is one of the fastest, most cost-controlled ways to put up a warehouse, factory or workshop in India — and SAMAN supplies the full range as a manufacturer, not a reseller. We fabricate eight configurations in-house, priced from ₹16,25,000 to ₹38,55,000, so the real question isn't what a PEB is — it's which configuration fits your span, your use and your budget. This page maps every building to the job it does best and shows each starting price, so you can shortlist before you call.

Which pre-engineered building fits your warehouse, factory or workshop?

Most buyers reach this page sure they want a pre-engineered building but unsure which configuration to order. Sort by what you're putting up and how wide a clear span you need. Smaller workshops, single-bay sheds and tight budgets — start with a factory-fabricated metal building (₹16,25,000) or a pre-engineered metal building (₹17,15,000), both light, quick-to-supply frames for modest spans. Standard factory units, godowns and production floors — a custom engineered building structure (₹17,25,000) gives you a frame designed to your loading; a pre-engineered steel building (₹18,15,000) steps up to IS-certified steel for longer service; and the standard pre-engineered building (₹19,65,000) is the all-round mid-range choice. Wide-span warehouses, logistics halls and heavier loads — a wide-span steel building (₹26,25,000) or an engineered metal building (₹27,35,000) carries larger column-free spans and higher roof loads. Largest, multi-bay or complete structures — the flagship pre-engineered building (₹38,55,000) is the top of the range, configured for the biggest footprints.

Pre-engineered building price list and configurations compared

This pre-engineered building price list sets the starting figure for each configuration. Footprint is shown as a span tier; exact clear span, eave height and bay spacing are fixed when your design is finalised.
Configuration Best for Footprint / span tier From ₹
Factory-fabricated metal building Single-bay sheds, modest spans Compact 16,25,000
Pre-engineered metal building Light workshops, quick supply Compact 17,15,000
Engineered building structure Custom-loaded factory frame Standard 17,25,000
Pre-engineered steel building Longer-service IS-steel build Standard 18,15,000
Standard pre-engineered building All-round mid-range unit Standard 19,65,000
Wide-span steel building Wide warehouses, logistics Wide 26,25,000
Engineered metal building Heavier loads, large spans Wide 27,35,000
Flagship pre-engineered building Largest, multi-bay structures Multi-bay 38,55,000
Starting prices are current SAMAN figures; the final quote depends on clear span, eave height, cladding grade and openings. Each product page lists its own starting point.

How much does a pre-engineered building cost in India?

A pre-engineered building from SAMAN costs between ₹16,25,000 and ₹38,55,000, set mainly by the configuration you choose. A factory-fabricated metal building sits at the entry point, a wide-span steel building is mid-range, and the complete flagship structure sits at the top. Clear span, eave height and cladding grade decide the final figure. Because a pre-engineered building is supplied as a set of IS-certified, factory-fabricated components, the price shown is for the building itself, delivered to your site. Site assembly and civil work are arranged separately — which keeps the supply cost transparent and easy to compare across configurations.

Why buy your pre-engineered building from a manufacturer, not a contractor

SAMAN is a pre-engineered building manufacturer, not a trading desk or a sub-contracting middleman. Every frame is fabricated in-house across our two units — Bangalore (Karnataka) and Greater Noida (Delhi NCR) — from IS-certified steel cut, drilled and welded to your design, then delivered to site as ready-to-bolt components. Buying the building direct from the maker means one accountable source for steel grade, fabrication quality and the starting price, with no reseller margin in between. There's a distinction worth getting right before you order. This range is the building supplied as a product — you receive the fabricated structure and arrange assembly on site. If you instead want the structure designed, supplied and erected for you under a single turnkey contract, that is SAMAN's separate PEB construction service, not this product range. For the full specification of the standard unit and how it ships, see our pre-engineered building range overview.

Pre-engineered building — buyer FAQs

What is the cost of a pre-engineered building in India?

From SAMAN, ₹16,25,000 to ₹38,55,000 depending on configuration. A factory-fabricated metal building is the entry point; a wide-span steel building is mid-range; the flagship structure is the top. The final figure is set by clear span, eave height, cladding grade and openings — each product page lists its own starting price.

Do you supply the building, or construct and erect it on site?

This range is supply — we manufacture the building from IS-certified steel and deliver it to your site as factory-fabricated, ready-to-bolt components for assembly. If you need the structure designed, supplied and erected under one turnkey contract, that is SAMAN's separate PEB construction service.

Which configuration suits a warehouse, a factory or a multi-bay structure — and what's the difference between steel and metal builds?

Wide-span warehouses and logistics halls suit a wide-span steel or engineered metal building; standard factories and workshops fit a standard pre-engineered or steel building; the largest multi-bay footprints take the flagship structure. "Metal" and "steel" builds use the same engineered-frame principle — heavier steel sections carry longer clear spans and higher roof loads.

Are SAMAN's pre-engineered buildings IS-certified, and how are they delivered?

Yes — frames are fabricated from IS-certified steel to IS 800 and IS 875 design standards, then delivered Pan-India as ready-to-bolt components from our Bangalore and Greater Noida units.

Get a pre-engineered building supply quote

Send your span, eave height, use and location, and we'll point you to the right configuration with an exact supply price. Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859 Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
